meta.title: CodeLess — Manage a real product, not just theory
meta.description: A PM course where you ship a real product with an AI team. Instead of a certificate — a portfolio.

hero.subtitle: PM courses teach you theory. With us you gain experience — you ship a real product alongside an AI team.

problem.label: How it really is
problem.title: A certificate has never shipped a product
problem.body: You learn Agile, pass a test, get a certificate — and then? Real projects bring deadlines, decisions and a team waiting on you.
problem.decision: And the decision is yours to make.

chat.name: Giorgi
chat.text: We're behind schedule, we need to push the deadline.

chat.name: Tamar
chat.text: The requested feature needs to change.

chat.name: Ana
chat.text: I found 5 bugs — which one is the priority?

chat.name: Nino
chat.text: We have 2 design versions, which do we pick?

stages.courseCaption: Watch lessons and memorize someone else's process.
stages.codelessCaption: Make decisions with an AI product team from day one.

stages.courseCaption: Choose the expected answer in a controlled exercise.
stages.codelessCaption: Meet real problems, make the call and learn from the result.

stages.courseCaption: The course ends, but the blank CV problem remains.
stages.codelessCaption: Finish with a working product, a story and proof of experience.

team.label: Your team
team.title: Manage a team, gain real experience
team.subtitle: From day one you manage a real team — an analyst, a designer, a developer, QA and a stakeholder.

members.name: QA
members.desc: Bugs must be caught before launch.

how.label: Process
how.title: From idea to launch
how.subtitle: A real product cycle — exactly like on the job.

steps.title: Idea
steps.desc: You shape the product idea and its goal.

steps.title: Requirements
steps.desc: You approve the BRD and priorities.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: You pick the mockup and user flow.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: You manage tasks and the team.

outcomes.label: Outcome
outcomes.title: In 6 weeks — a real, shipped product on your CV
outcomes.subtitle: You don't just walk away with a certificate — you keep the experience, a portfolio and a real story.

stats.label: from idea to a live product

points.title: A real portfolio
points.desc: A shipped product you can show on your CV.

points.title: Job-ready
points.desc: You know what a real process looks like.

register.label: Start now
register.title: Claim your spot in the next cohort
register.subtitle: Register your interest — no payment required yet. We'll reach out with the details.

success.title: Thank you!
success.body: Your application has been received. We'll be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: The PM course where you ship a real product.
